title: Alpha Project Requirements Review Notes 3/17
content:
## Alpha Project Requirements Review

### Attendees
Wang Ming (Project Manager), Li Hua (Architect)

### Meeting Conclusions
Confirmed Q2 three core feature requirements, priority ranking completed.

### Action Items
1. [Wang Ming] Complete requirements specification final draft, due 3/21 -> Completed
2. [Li Hua] Write interface design document, due 3/22 -> Completed
3. [Li Hua] Technical feasibility assessment report, due 3/25 -> In progress, expected to deliver on time

title: Alpha Project Technical Design Notes 3/20
content:
## Alpha Project Technical Design

### Attendees
Li Hua (Architect), Ma Qiang (Ops)

### Meeting Conclusions
Decided to adopt microservice architecture, need further verification of deployment plan.

### Action Items
1. [Ma Qiang] Complete deployment environment setup, due 3/24 -> Completed
2. [Li Hua] Microservice architecture plan document, due 3/28 -> Not started, depends on feasibility report conclusions

title: Beta Project Kickoff Notes 3/18
content:
## Beta Project Kickoff

### Attendees
Zhao Lei (Product Manager), Zhang Wei (Backend Dev), Zhou Ming (Frontend Dev)

### Meeting Conclusions
Project duration 6 weeks, delivered in three iterations. First iteration focuses on core features.

### Action Items
1. [Zhao Lei] Complete PRD document first draft, due 3/21 -> Completed
2. [Zhang Wei] Complete backend database design, due 3/24 -> In progress, approximately 60% done
3. [Zhou Ming] Complete frontend prototype design, due 3/22 -> Blocked, waiting for third-party API documentation (vendor contacted, expected to provide by 3/28)

title: Beta Project Progress Check Notes 3/22
content:
## Beta Project Progress Check

### Attendees
Zhao Lei (Product Manager), Zhang Wei (Backend Dev)

### Meeting Conclusions
Overall progress behind by approximately 1 week. Need to add resources or adjust schedule. Frontend blocked by third-party API documentation.

### Action Items
1. [Zhang Wei] Complete API development (high priority), due 3/25 -> Pending, already overdue! Originally due 3/25 but depends on incomplete database design
2. [Zhao Lei] Coordinate third-party API documentation acquisition, due 3/24 -> Pending, still following up

title: Gamma Project Client Meeting Notes 3/19
content:
## Gamma Project Client Meeting

### Attendees
Zhao Lei (Product Manager), Wang Ming (Project Manager)

### Meeting Conclusions
Client confirmed all feature requirements, acceptance criteria agreed upon. Project progressing smoothly.

### Action Items
1. [Wang Ming] Compile client-confirmed acceptance criteria document, due 3/21 -> Completed
2. [Zhao Lei] Update project delivery plan, due 3/22 -> Completed
